# yucss

> A fast-paced CSS and Yumma CSS quiz. 10 questions, 2 minutes — type the CSS property or Yumma CSS class from memory.

yucss tests frontend developer knowledge of Yumma CSS utility classes and their underlying CSS declarations. Each round randomly assigns questions in both directions: Yumma CSS → CSS and CSS → Yumma CSS.

## How it works

- 10 questions per round, 120 second timer
- Three difficulty levels: easy, normal, expert
- Questions are drawn from a curated pool of Yumma CSS/CSS pairs
- Answer checking is forgiving: case, whitespace around colons, and trailing semicolons are all normalised
- Score = (correct answers × 50) + time bonus (seconds remaining)

## Question format

Each question is a pair: a Yumma CSS utility class and its CSS declaration.

Examples:
- tw: "flex" → css: "display: flex"
- tw: "w-full" → css: "width: 100%"

## Site

- URL: https://www.yucss.vercel.app
- Built with React 19 and Vite
- No framework, no router, no state library
